items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having evidence/context snapshots for forensic replay. However, the evidence does not include any specific snapshots or details that confirm the existence of such evidence, leading to an inconclusive status. The lack of concrete data to support the requirement means that it cannot be definitively assessed as satisfied or not.
